intended_use: AIR Recon DL is a deep learning-based reconstruction technique that is available for use on GE HealthCare 1.5T, 3.0T, and 7.0T MR systems. AIR Recon DL reduces noise and ringing (truncation artifacts)
intended_use_full: AIR Recon DL is a deep learning-based reconstruction technique that is available for use on GE HealthCare 1.5T, 3.0T, and 7.0T MR systems. AIR Recon DL reduces noise and ringing (truncation artifacts) in MR images, which can be used to reduce scan time and improve image quality. AIR Recon DL is intended for use with all anatomies, and for patients of all ages.
ground_truth: For diffusion imaging: ROI measurements in lateral ventricles where isotropic Gaussian diffusion is expected; for low-contrast detectability: synthetic objects inserted in raw data; for clinical assessment: board-certified radiologist review
other_metrics: Signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) improvement; sharpness improvement; contrast-to-noise ratio improvement; low contrast detectability improvement; ADC accuracy and repeatability; phase correction accuracy
